zh.Broad Oak, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾布洛阿德 歐亞可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Treadway於1430年出生在英國哈普爾素坦普頓時，他的父親William Treadway30歲，母親Cecilia Speede34歲。他於1464年與Johanna在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年在英國越可爾享年92歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.Broad Oak, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾布洛阿德 歐亞可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Treadway于1430年出生在英国哈普爾素坦普頓时，他的父亲William Treadway30岁，母亲Cecilia Speede34岁。他于1464年与Johanna在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年在英国越可爾享年92岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Treadway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English treden ‘to tread, trample’ + wei(e) ‘way’, perhaps used for a vagrant or a well-traveled man.

variants.name: Tredway
meanings: English: variant of   Treadway  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Treadway was born in 1430, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, his father, William Treadway, was 30 and his mother, Cecilia Speede, was 34. He married Johanna in 1464, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1522, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 92, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Treadway est né en 1430, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William Treadway, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Speede, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Johanna en 1464, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1522, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Treadway 1430 in Southampton, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Treadway 30 und seine Mutter Cecilia Speede 34. Er hat 1464 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1522 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Treadway è nato il nel 1430 nel Southampton, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, William Treadway, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Speede, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Johanna nel 1464, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1522, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Treadwayが1430年にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで生まれた時，父William Treadwayは30歳，母Cecilia Speedeは34歳であった。1464年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohannaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで92歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Treadway(이)가 1430년 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Treadway(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Speede(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Johanna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 영국 요르크실르에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Treadway nasceu em 1430, em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Treadway, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Speede, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna em 1464, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1522, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Treadway родился в 1430 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Treadway было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Speede, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna в 1464 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1522 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Treadway nació en 1430, en Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Treadway, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cecilia Speede, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Johanna en 1464, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1522, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
